title: Planning Maturity Summary
goal: Update planning summary/query behavior so explicit maturity and status fields answer active, ready, shaping, deferred, blocked, and residue-routing questions.
non_goals: Do not build a project-management dashboard.
Do not broadly scan archives by default.
Do not migrate state storage to work_items in this slice.

intent.outcome: Compact and full summary expose maturity-specific planning buckets from explicit state fields instead of bucket location inference.
intent.constraints: Keep output small, generic, and repo-/agent-/tool-agnostic.
intent.latitude: Choose exact field names and compact projection shape that satisfy #499 without adding a new command.
intent.escalation: Stop before state migration, dashboard expansion, or archive-wide default reads.

execution.milestone: Expose explicit maturity buckets in planning summary.
execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #499, then continue with #500 when selected.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, planning doctor, summary

invariants: Active execplans remain the execution authority.
Ready slices are visible without raw lane reads.
Closed items missing residue are maintenance pressure, not active work.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Planning state supports progressive refinement and multi-agent handoff through explicit maturity, roles, promotion, and closeout state.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Summary and report now expose explicit maturity buckets for active, ready, shaping, deferred, blocked, and residue-routing work.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: State migration and promotion/closeout transition helpers.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Legacy Markdown state must keep working; work_maturity falls back to active execplan compatibility when TOML state is unavailable.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Focused maturity/report tests, root summary CLI tests, full planning package tests, ruff, doctor, planning-surface checker, summary, and report passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #499; continue #500/#501 for migration and transitions.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Implement #499 planning summary/query behavior for explicit work maturity.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make state maturity cheap to inspect without opening raw planning files.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add maturity-specific summary buckets and compact tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Reject changes that make summary large or infer maturity from storage location.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package summary/projection code and tests; active planning files
execution_bounds.required validation commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any migration of state shape or broad report/dashboard redesign.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: generated CLI, structured-file schemas, agent aid lifecycle

stop_conditions.stop when: #499 acceptance is met with maturity buckets and focused tests.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The next change needs a new command or broad dashboard behavior.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Summary or current v1 state reports warnings.

context_budget.live working set: #499 issue body, planning-state v1 validation, planning summary projections
context_budget.recoverable later: parent #496 details and later child issues
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed <paths> --format json
context_budget.context-shift triggers: subagent map shows broader impact than summary/query behavior.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Expose explicit maturity buckets in compact planning summary.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No dashboard; no archive-wide default scan; active execplans remain execution authority.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact field names and tests for maturity bucket projection.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Maturity behavior needs state migration or transition automation.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan and continue #500 from the planning-state-maturity lane.
invariants: Explicit maturity/status fields drive the answer.
Maintenance residue is separated from execution pressure.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Maturity buckets should be visible from summary without opening raw state.
open_questions_to_close: Which compact field should own active/ready/shaping/deferred/blocked/residue bucket answers?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Summary uses explicit maturity/status fields rather than bucket inference.
Ready slices are visible without opening all lanes.
Active execplans remain the execution source.
Closed items missing durable-residue routing surface as maintenance pressure.
Tests cover compact and full summary output for the new state shape.

execution_run.what happened: Added the work_maturity projection to full and compact planning summary plus planning report, with maturity bucket tests.
execution_run.scope touched: planning summary/report projection code, planning package tests, root summary CLI tests by validation, and active planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "maturity or summary_compact_profile or planning_report"; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-planning-bootstrap report --target . --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #499 is complete; #500/#501 remain in the planning-state-maturity lane.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no dashboard, archive-wide default scan, state migration, or new command was added.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; summary/report now expose explicit maturity buckets.
finished_run_review.config compliance: respected repo and local config by using compact summary, proof selection, checked-in active planning, and bounded package/planning surfaces before implementation

proof_report.validation proof: focused maturity/report tests, root summary CLI tests, full planning package tests, ruff, doctor, planning-surface checker, summary, and report passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: Explicit maturity buckets are queryable in compact/full summary and report while active execplans remain execution authority.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 146 planning tests passed; 4 root summary CLI tests passed; ruff passed; doctor healthy; planning-surface checker clean; summary warning_count 0; report health active.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Update summary and query behavior for explicit work maturity.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: work_maturity exposes active_execplans, ready_slices, needs_shaping, deferred_lanes, blocked_items, and residue_routing_needed from explicit maturity/status fields.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make restart, handoff, and delegation cheaper through compact queryable state.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Expose small routing buckets, not a full dashboard.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can an agent see maturity state cheaply without raw planning reads?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #499 is satisfied while parent #496 remains open for #500/#501.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: work_maturity projection and tests cover explicit maturity buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: summary does not expose ready/shaping/deferred/blocked/residue buckets from explicit maturity

durable_residue.learned constraint: Explicit maturity should make summary cheaper without making it bigger than a router.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Agents should not have to infer maturity from raw TOML bucket placement.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Planning summary/report expose explicit maturity buckets without dashboard creep.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: 146 planning tests, 4 root summary CLI tests, ruff, doctor, planning-surface checker, summary, and report passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Keep maturity-bucket contract in code/tests and continue migration/transition behavior in #500/#501.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory/docs/config promotion needed; durable contract lives in summary/report tests.

discard.summary: No local execution detail needs durable promotion beyond proof fields.

continuation.summary: Planning-state maturity continues through #500-#501 after maturity summary behavior.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted #499 from planning-state-maturity roadmap lane into an active execplan.
